input_messages.content: {"overall_assessment": {"mitigation_outcome": "failure", "summary": "No mitigation was proposed or implemented. The messages in the conversation only state 'Mitigation limit reached' and contain no actionable configuration, commands, or placement of protection (Snort) despite an active ICMP flood reported from the compromised host (UbuntuComputer 192.168.1.3). Because nothing was attempted, the attack remains active and unmitigated."}, "multi_agent_kpis": {"task_completion_rate": {"score": 1, "justification": "The team did not propose or apply any mitigation steps against the active ICMP flood;
